case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. CARMEN JARA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JARA, CARMEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 373 ELLIS STREET #405, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OTHER OCCUPANTS SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT JARA, CARMEN DOES 1 TO 5
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JARA, CARMEN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT JARA, CARMEN
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT JARA, CARMEN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED NOV-24-2012, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT JARA, CARMEN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED NOV-24-2012, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $10.60 FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
